summary: Deliverable incomplete and has critical issues. PowerShell code is well-structured (Set-StrictMode, proper error handling, clear docs), but workflow has security violation: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA (fails actionlint validation). Task requires TDD with Pester tests, fixtures, and act validation—none provided. Missing: ./tests, fixtures/*.txt files, actionlint validation proof, act test runs, act-result.txt artifact. Dead code: line 45 workflow assigns unused $actualBump variable. Well-written scripts cannot compensate for incomplete, unvalidated deliverable.
